name: 7-up Lemon Cheesecake with Strawberry Glaze
recipeIngredient: Lemon pudding and pie filling (1 1/2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine well the graham cracker crumbs, powdered sugar, cinnamon, and melted butter. Press onto the bottom and partway up the sides of a buttered 9-inch springform pan; chill.
2. Soften the unflavored gelatin in 1/4 cup 7-Up for 4 minutes.
3. In a saucepan combine the pie filling, sugar, beaten eggs, and water. Blend well.
4. Add 1-1/4 cups 7-Up and bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly; remove from heat. Stir in softened gelatin; cool for 3 minutes.
5. Add 1/2 cup of this warm mixture to the softened cream cheese; mash together. Mix with the remaining 7-Up mixture and stir until well blended.
6. Turn into chilled crust and chill for at least 8 hours. Remove from pan and add topping.
7. Topping: Brush the top of the chilled cheesecake with melted jelly. Arrange fresh strawberries upright on the cake and spoon any remaining melted jelly over them.
